title: tagetes arenicola
intro: Tagetes arenicola, also known as the sand marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tagetes arenicola include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin irritations, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Tagetes arenicola can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
